rules.name: Early Control Gate
rules.description: Block privileged tools without safety token parity verification

rules.name: Secrets in .env Blocking
rules.description: Prevent writing secrets, tokens, or API keys to .env files

rules.name: Git Push Blocking
rules.description: Block git push commands (CI push exception available via ALLOW_CI_PUSH)

rules.name: Git Reset --hard Blocking
rules.description: Block destructive git reset --hard commands

rules.name: Git Clean -fdx Blocking
rules.description: Block git clean with force, directories, and ignored files flags

rules.name: Force Checkout Blocking
rules.description: Block git checkout --force that discards uncommitted changes

rules.name: Interactive Rebase Blocking
rules.description: Block git rebase -i (interactive rebase)

rules.name: Repo Deletion Blocking
rules.description: Block gh repo delete commands

rules.name: Destructive rm Blocking
rules.description: Block rm -rf targeting root, home, or system directories

rules.name: OS Shutdown Blocking
rules.description: Block shutdown, reboot, and halt system commands

rules.name: Disk Operations Blocking
rules.description: Block dd, mkfs, format, and other destructive disk operations

rules.name: PowerShell Remove-Item Blocking
rules.description: Block Remove-Item targeting system drives (C:\, D:\, etc.)

rules.name: Production Access Guard
rules.description: Block commands targeting production environments or databases

rules.name: Timeout Enforcement
rules.description: Require non-zero timeout on all terminal commands

rules.name: Background Execution Blocking
rules.description: Block isBackground=true on terminal commands

rules.name: Watch/Interactive Blocking
rules.description: Block watch modes, interactive debuggers, and REPL sessions

rules.name: Vitest Run Mode
rules.description: Require vitest to run in non-interactive mode (vitest run)

rules.name: Playwright UI/Debug Blocking
rules.description: Block Playwright interactive and debug modes (--ui, --debug)

rules.name: Dotnet --no-restore
rules.description: Require --no-restore flag for dotnet test commands

rules.name: Session Start Logging
rules.description: Log session start events for diagnostics

rules.name: Prompt Logging
rules.description: Log user prompts for session replay and diagnostics

rules.name: Post-Tool Logging
rules.description: Log tool execution results for diagnostics

rules.name: Error Logging
rules.description: Log error events for diagnostics and debugging
